title: corytholoma rutilum
intro: Corytholoma rutilum, also known as the red-flowering corytholoma, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Rhamnaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and soothing skin irritations. Corytholoma rutilum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
